_publications._publicationTitle: Effect of simvastatin on cognitive functioning in children with neurofibromatosis type 1: a randomized controlled trial.

_contextSnippet: except for a higher score on the object assembly test in the simvastatin group using univariate analysis...β = 0.50 [95% CI, 0.05 to 0.95]...as well as multivariate analysis...β = 0.54 [95% CI, 0.08 to 1.01]
details: Object assembly subtest showed higher scores in simvastatin group (β = 0.50, 95% CI 0.05-0.95 univariate; β = 0.54, 95% CI 0.08-1.01 multivariate)
